target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Visible extensive facade damage with large sections missing; multiple floors show collapsed or missing balconies and windows; structural integrity appears compromised with leaning and partial collapse; damage covers more than 45% of visible target element area.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: Visible extensive damage to facade and balconies; large sections of exterior walls missing; structural elements appear compromised; damage exceeds 45% of visible target area consistent with severe damage definition.

summary: Two buildings assessed: one with SEVERE DAMAGE (PROBABLE confidence) and another with SEVERE DAMAGE (CONFIRMED confidence). The scene depicts two multi-story residential buildings with extensive facade damage, missing windows, and compromised structural elements, situated beside a road with trees and vegetation. The likely functional impact is complete loss of habitability and structural safety for both buildings.
